hook: A good move off the app feels like a natural next step, not a forced leap.
body: The transition works best when enough rapport exists to make the move feel earned but not delayed past usefulness.

hook: Some men either ask too soon out of impatience or wait too long out of fear.
body: Aim for the moment when the interaction already has momentum and a simple next step would clarify rather than disrupt it.
